headline: General Motors Is a Cash-Compounding Machine. Buy the Stock.
summary: GM’s stock, however, is up more than 40% over the past five years even as its market cap clocks in around $75 billion today.  The magic is share repurchases: GM has spent roughly $30 billion retiring 500 million shares over that span.  Since 2021, GM has generated about $53 billion in free cash flow, despite Covid, inflating prices, tariffs, and ever-changing EV policies.
